nasb.text: Now I lifted up my eyes again and looked, and behold, four chariots were coming forth from between the two mountains; and the mountains were bronze mountains.

esv.text: Again I lifted my eyes and saw, and behold, four chariots came out from between two mountains. And the mountains were mountains of bronze.

cnv.text: 我又舉目觀看，看見有四輛戰車從兩座山中間出來，那兩座山是銅山。

ccb.text: 我又举目观看，见有四辆马车从两座铜山之间出来。
